name: V4LESS
notes:
# Policy / About

AS215250 is a testbed for evaluating running a network on RFC8950 / IPv4 Network Layer Reachability Information (NLRI) with an IPv6 Next Hop only.

The network is present at IXPs to allow network operators to experiment with interconnecting to a remote AS not using IPv4 for eBGP or internal transport.

In the future, sessions for all members on each IXP where AS215250 is present will be preconfigured in passive mode. Until then please reach out if you want to setup a session.

For peering sessions, IPv6 + Extended Nexthop is required. IPv4 sessions are not supported.

Please see the website for further information on how to run tests out of AS215250 (RIPE Atlas probes and NLNOG Ring nodes): https://measurement.network/services/v4less-as/
